case_title: JUANA RIVERA VS. JOSE UBALDO MARENCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY RIVERA, JUANA AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE UBALDO DBA  JENNY & JESSE RESTAURANTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAR-10-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE UBALDO DBA  JENNY & JESSE RESTAURANTS
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON MARCH 10, 2011 (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JUANA AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE UBALDO DBA  JENNY & JESSE RESTAURANTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. FRANCISCO COELLO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NOEMY DUENAS INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLSIH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JUANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE UBALDO DBA  JENNY & JESSE RESTAURANTS $2,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,010.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE UBALDO DBA  JENNY & JESSE RESTAURANTS
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 GRANTED
